title: feat: track BYOP app attribution in Tinybird events
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Following the pollen trail
gist.blurb: We finally taught our analytics pipeline to remember which apps are actually driving Bring-Your-Own-Pollen traffic. Credit where credit is due.
gist.summary: Added app attribution metadata to our Tinybird analytics events for BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) requests.
gist.impact: We can now accurately track and credit the specific community apps generating traffic through the authorization flow.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a detective or surveyor, following a trail of glowing pollen dust (data) leading to a specific app/flower. A cute robot with a monitor head holding a clipboard, checking off data points.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat, inspecting a glowing trail of lime green (#ecf874) pollen dust leading to a blooming code-plant. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and nostalgic.
